assumption_text: No peninsula-wide Korean War population or force denominator is imported into Seoul-specific episodes.
rationale: That would destroy the urban specificity the bundle is trying to recover.

assumption_text: The Marine Corps official-history casualty figure is treated as a Seoul recapture-corridor numerator even though it is not a perfect municipal-boundary count.
rationale: It is still the best open military numerator directly tied to the Seoul recapture literature used here.

assumption_text: The hospital massacre estimate is kept in unknown-status form because the open source summary does not reconcile total, civilian, and wounded-soldier counts cleanly.
rationale: Strictness is preferable to silently forcing a status split that the source itself does not support cleanly.
